Internal Complaint Committee (ICC) Internal Complaint Committee (ICC) The Internal Complaints Committee (ICC) has been constituted in accordance with the Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace (Prevention, Prohibition and Redressal) Act, 2013. Its role is to receive and inquire into complaints of sexual harassment at the workplace and recommend appropriate action. Presiding Officer Prof. Dr. Poonam Sharma Professor, Department of BT/BI, JUIT, Waknaghat Email: poonam.sharma@juitsolan.in Phone: 01792 – 239402 Faculty Members Dr. Shweta Pandit Associate Professor, Department of ECE, JUIT, Waknaghat Email: shweta.pandit@juitsolan.in Phone: 01792 – 239216 Dr. Harsh Sohal Associate Professor, Department of ECE, JUIT, Waknaghat Email: harsh.sohal@juitsolan.in Phone: 01792 – 239506 Dr. Ekta Gandotra Associate Professor, Department of CSE&IT, JUIT, Waknaghat Email: ekta.gandotra@juitsolan.in Phone: 01792 – 239289 Non Teaching Staff - Members Dr. Vipin Sharma Astt Librarian - LRC vipin.sharma@juitsolan.in 9418460594 Mrs. Mamta Sr. Lab Technician - BT/Bl mamta.mishra@juitsolan.in 7831085318 Student -Members Ms. Manisha Thakur, (Civil Engg) Ph.D. 246602@juitsolan.in Member - Student (Research Scholar) Ms. Sushamjot Kaur, M.Sc.
